attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SDPH.AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER 	AS BK_PROMOTION_NUM,
SDPH.REVISION_NUMBER 		AS BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT,
SDPH.PROMO_TYPE 			AS BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD,
CASE
	WHEN SDPH.BUNDLE_FLAG IS NULL THEN '=' 
	ELSE SDPH.BUNDLE_FLAG 
END 						AS PROMOTION_BUNDLE_FLG,
SDPH.PROMO_CATEGORY 		AS PROMOTION_CATEGORY_TYPE_CD,
SDPH.CREATED_DATE 			AS SOURCE_CREATED_BY_DTM,
SDPH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE		AS SOURCE_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
SDPH.CREATED_BY				AS CREATED_BY_AS_REPORTED_USER,
SDPH.UPDATED_BY				AS UPDATED_BY_AS_REPORTED_USER,
SDPH.PRICE_LIST_TYPE		AS PROMOTION_PRICE_LIST_TYPE_CD,
SDPH.MAX_DEAL_VALUE			AS MAXIMUM_ALLOWABLE_DEAL_AMT,
SDPH.PROMO_START_DATE		AS PROMOTION_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
SDPH.ORIGIN_THEATRE			AS REPORTED_PROMOTION_THEATRE_CD,
SDPH.PROMO_END_DATE			AS PROMOTION_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
SDPH.DAYS_FOR_CLAIM			AS MAX_DAYS_ALLWD_PRMTN_CLAIM_CNT,
SDPH.PROMO_SOURCE			AS PROMOTION_SOURCE_NAME,
SDPH.PROMO_DESCRIPTION		AS PROMOTION_SHORT_DESCR,
SDPH.PROMO_NAME				AS PROMOTION_NAME,
SDPH.STANDARD_BULLETIN_NO	AS STANDARD_BULLETIN_NUM,
SDPH.PROMO_ID				AS SK_PROMO_ID_INT,
SDPH.INITIATED_BY			AS PROMOTION_INITIATOR_NAME,	
NCWP_APRV.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY	AS PRMTN_APRVD_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
SDPH.APPROVED_BY			AS SRC_RPTD_PROMOTION_APPRVR_NAME,
CASE 
	WHEN SDPH.ACTIVE_FLAG='Y' THEN 'N'
	WHEN SDPH.ACTIVE_FLAG='N' THEN 'Y'
END 						AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
SDPH.CURRENCY_CODE			AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
SDPH.DEAL_ID				AS BK_DEAL_ID,
NPL_WPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME	AS WHOLESALE_PRICE_LIST_NAME,
NPL_GPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME	AS GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_NAME,
NPL_MHPI.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME	AS PROD_FMLY_PRMTN_PRC_LIST_NAME,
NCWP_CAM.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY		AS CHNL_ACCT_MGR_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
SDPH.SPLIT_FLAG AS PROMOTION_SPLIT_FLG,
SDPH.MARKET_TYPE AS MARKET_TYPE_CD,
SDPH.CHANNEL_TYPE AS CHANNEL_TYPE_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS   EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS   EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_PROMO_HEADER SDPH
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_APRV
ON SDPH.APPROVED_BY=NCWP_APRV.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS AND SDPH.APPROVED_BY IS NOT NULL
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_CAM
ON SDPH.CAM_ID=NCWP_CAM.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID AND SDPH.CAM_ID IS NOT NULL  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST NPL_WPL
ON NPL_WPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT=SDPH.WPL_ID AND SDPH.WPL_ID IS NOT NULL
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST NPL_GPL
ON NPL_GPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT=SDPH.GPL_ID AND SDPH.GPL_ID IS NOT NULL
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST NPL_MHPI
ON NPL_MHPI.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT=SDPH.MAJ_HEAD_PRLIST_ID AND SDPH.MAJ_HEAD_PRLIST_ID IS NOT NULL

SELECT
SDPH.PROMO_ID,
SDPH.AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER,
SDPH.PROMO_TYPE,
SDPH.PROMO_SOURCE,
SDPH.PROMO_START_DATE,
SDPH.PROMO_END_DATE,
SDPH.DAYS_FOR_CLAIM,
SDPH.INITIATED_BY,
SDPH.APPROVED_BY,
SDPH.ACTIVE_FLAG,
SDPH.CREATED_BY,
SDPH.CREATED_DATE,
SDPH.UPDATED_BY,
SDPH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SDPH.MAX_DEAL_VALUE,
SDPH.PRICE_LIST_TYPE,
SDPH.PROMO_DESCRIPTION,
SDPH.STANDARD_BULLETIN_NO,
SDPH.ORIGIN_THEATRE,
SDPH.CURRENCY_CODE,
SDPH.DEAL_ID,
SDPH.PROMO_CATEGORY,
SDPH.WPL_ID,
SDPH.GPL_ID,
SDPH.MAJ_HEAD_PRLIST_ID,
SDPH.BUNDLE_FLAG,
SDPH.CAM_ID,
SDPH.PROMO_NAME,
SDPH.REVISION_NUMBER,
SDPH.PROMO_MAX_DEAL_VALUE,
SDPH.BATCH_ID,
SDPH.ACTION_CD,
SDPH.CREATE_DATETIME,
'NE' 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_PROMO_HEADER SDPH
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST NPL_WPL
WHERE NPL_WPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT=SDPH.WPL_ID)
 AND SDPH.WPL_ID IS NOT NULL

UNION

SELECT
SDPH.PROMO_ID,
SDPH.AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER,
SDPH.PROMO_TYPE,
SDPH.PROMO_SOURCE,
SDPH.PROMO_START_DATE,
SDPH.PROMO_END_DATE,
SDPH.DAYS_FOR_CLAIM,
SDPH.INITIATED_BY,
SDPH.APPROVED_BY,
SDPH.ACTIVE_FLAG,
SDPH.CREATED_BY,
SDPH.CREATED_DATE,
SDPH.UPDATED_BY,
SDPH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SDPH.MAX_DEAL_VALUE,
SDPH.PRICE_LIST_TYPE,
SDPH.PROMO_DESCRIPTION,
SDPH.STANDARD_BULLETIN_NO,
SDPH.ORIGIN_THEATRE,
SDPH.CURRENCY_CODE,
SDPH.DEAL_ID,
SDPH.PROMO_CATEGORY,
SDPH.WPL_ID,
SDPH.GPL_ID,
SDPH.MAJ_HEAD_PRLIST_ID,
SDPH.BUNDLE_FLAG,
SDPH.CAM_ID,
SDPH.PROMO_NAME,
SDPH.REVISION_NUMBER,
SDPH.PROMO_MAX_DEAL_VALUE,
SDPH.BATCH_ID,
SDPH.ACTION_CD,
SDPH.CREATE_DATETIME,
'NE' 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_PROMO_HEADER SDPH
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST NPL_GPL
WHERE NPL_GPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT=SDPH.GPL_ID )
AND SDPH.GPL_ID IS NOT NULL

UNION 

SELECT
SDPH.PROMO_ID,
SDPH.AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER,
SDPH.PROMO_TYPE,
SDPH.PROMO_SOURCE,
SDPH.PROMO_START_DATE,
SDPH.PROMO_END_DATE,
SDPH.DAYS_FOR_CLAIM,
SDPH.INITIATED_BY,
SDPH.APPROVED_BY,
SDPH.ACTIVE_FLAG,
SDPH.CREATED_BY,
SDPH.CREATED_DATE,
SDPH.UPDATED_BY,
SDPH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SDPH.MAX_DEAL_VALUE,
SDPH.PRICE_LIST_TYPE,
SDPH.PROMO_DESCRIPTION,
SDPH.STANDARD_BULLETIN_NO,
SDPH.ORIGIN_THEATRE,
SDPH.CURRENCY_CODE,
SDPH.DEAL_ID,
SDPH.PROMO_CATEGORY,
SDPH.WPL_ID,
SDPH.GPL_ID,
SDPH.MAJ_HEAD_PRLIST_ID,
SDPH.BUNDLE_FLAG,
SDPH.CAM_ID,
SDPH.PROMO_NAME,
SDPH.REVISION_NUMBER,
SDPH.PROMO_MAX_DEAL_VALUE,
SDPH.BATCH_ID,
SDPH.ACTION_CD,
SDPH.CREATE_DATETIME,
'NE' 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_PROMO_HEADER SDPH
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST NPL_MHPI
WHERE NPL_MHPI.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT=SDPH.MAJ_HEAD_PRLIST_ID )
AND SDPH.MAJ_HEAD_PRLIST_ID IS NOT NULL
